headline: Is It Too Late To Consider TJX Companies (TJX) After A 28% One Year Gain?
summary: For investors considering whether TJX Companies at around US$161.60 is still a potential entry point or if the value story has cooled, this article explores what the current price may be implying. The stock has recent returns of 0.2% over 7 days, 2.4% over 30 days, 4.7% year to date, and 27.6% over 1 year, which raises questions about how much of the story is already reflected in the share price. Recent attention on TJX Companies has focused on its position in off-price retail and how its...
